description_long: This is a brown slip-on casual shoe with a rugged, black rubber sole and visible stitching along the upper edges. The upper material appears to be leather or synthetic leather, with a matte finish and subtle creasing that suggests some use. The shoe features elastic side gores for easy wearing and removal, and the interior is lined with a soft, darker material for comfort. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, and the outsole has a textured tread for improved grip. The back of the shoe shows some wear and scuffing, particularly at the heel. Overall, the shoe is designed for everyday urban use, combining durability with a classic, understated style.
description: A brown slip-on casual shoe with a rugged black sole, visible stitching, and elastic side gores for easy wear. The shoe shows some wear, especially at the heel, and is designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel area with visible wear and scuffing, as well as the opening and interior lining.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown leather upper, detailed stitching, and the rugged black sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, central stitching, and the slightly worn appearance of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slip-on design, stitching, and the textured sole.
